dismissalText.commentary: Priyansh Arya c Sindhu b Mohammed Siraj 2 (2b 0x4 0x6 2m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: If he doesn't get you on the first, he'll get you with his second. Mo Siraj with a first strike! Back of a length delivery outside off. He carves it but not in the gap. Nishant Sindhu, on debut, runs to his left, dives and takes a lovely catch at deep backward point.

dismissalText.commentary: Prabhsimran Singh c Suthar b Rabada 15 (14b 2x4 0x6 29m) SR: 107.14

dismissalComment.html: Pace is pace yaar! A 152kph thunderbolt from Rabada and Prabhsimran is walking back for 15! On a length on off stump, Prabhsimran wants to go over covers like his captain did in the previous over. Only manages to splice a drive and cover takes the simplest of catches

dismissalText.commentary: Cooper Connolly c †Buttler b Mohammed Siraj 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Oh, does Siraj have two in two? Buttler is up in appeal right away. The umpire takes his time and gives him caught behind. Connolly isn't sure and chats with Prabhsimran before going up. Excellent first ball from Siraj. Good length ball that starts just around off and decks back sharply into Connolly. He drives on the up, and replays confirm there is a thin inside-edge through to Buttler.

dismissalText.commentary: Shreyas Iyer b Holder 19 (21b 3x4 0x6 40m) SR: 90.47

dismissalComment.html: Chopped on and Iyer has to go back! Holder gets into the act. PBKS in all sorts now. Rising back of a length ball on off stump at 134.6kph. Iyer wants to run that fine but that's too close to his body. He gets a thin inside-edge and the bails light up. Iyer has a long look at the pitch, but that won't change the result.

dismissalText.commentary: Nehal Wadhera c †Buttler b Holder 0 (6b 0x4 0x6 5m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Oh, that's a poor shot and Wadhera's struggles continue. He falls for a six-ball duck. Lovely lines from Holder. On a length with a hint of nibble away from Wadhera, who feels for it, gets a thick outside edge and Buttler does the rest diving to his left. Holder is off on a celebratory run. Look at him go!

dismissalText.commentary: Suryansh Shedge c †Buttler b Rabada 57 (29b 3x4 5x6 44m) SR: 196.55

dismissalComment.html: And now it's all over for Shedge. Rabada wins the battle. Back of a length and Shedge goes for a nothing cut, too close to his body especially with that bounce on the delivery. Edge goes to the keeper and Shedge seems displeased with himself, as he should be. Job was left to be done and now PBKS are six down. Rabada fell over in his follow-through and aurafarms after the dismissal, as he summersaults back up to his legs

dismissalText.long: c Shubman Gill b Rashid Khan
dismissalText.commentary: Marco Jansen c Shubman Gill b Rashid Khan 20 (11b 1x4 1x6 25m) SR: 181.81

dismissalComment.html: Gill is nonchalant as you like! Ball was fired in on a length and outside wide marker once more. Jansen goes for it anyway, on the back foot and powers it straight to covers. Gill is lying in wait and he has to use his own long arms to grab this one into his dive. He lies on the ground for a few beats but when he gets back up, signals that it's always been out. Whaddagrab

dismissalComment.html: Wowwww, do we have a plot twist after all! Connolly has taken a magnificent catch down at cow corner. For a moment, looked like he'd send it over the ropes, but it held in the pitch once more. Just didn't get the elevation he needed from this
